EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a Admiral scheme customer at the third attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Unable to reach - Add-on Comms ADM
EmailTemplate.subject: Want to add more coverage to your renewal quote?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I’ve been struggling to reach you to discuss your renewal quote.
To make sure your renewal quote includes all the coverage you need, are you interested in adding more coverage to your renewal policy?
- Hired in Plant cover - Covers you in the instance that plant equipment was damaged or stolen. - Own Plant cover - Covers you in the instance that plant equipment was damaged or stolen. - Contract Works - Covers you against accidental loss, destruction or damage for materials and labour that you've used caused by an unforeseen event in order to restore the project to its status prior to occurrence. - Professional Indemnity - Covers you against the cost of compensating a client for loss caused by negligent services or advice
Want to add any of these to your renewal quote? Let me know the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
